name: browser-use
description: Give Codex a hosted Browser Use cloud agent: a stealth cloud browser plus the browser-use-2.0 agent for long-horizon web tasks. No local Chrome.

interface.shortDescription: Stealth cloud browser + agent for long-horizon web tasks.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the hosted Browser Use MCP. Codex can spin up a stealth cloud browser and run long-horizon web tasks — browse, extract data, fill forms, log in, solve CAPTCHAs — with the browser-use-2.0 agent. Anti-detection, residential proxies, and automatic CAPTCHA solving are built in. No local Chrome and no CLI; set your Browser Use API key at install (free key at cloud.browser-use.com).
